sequence.action: IMAP sweep — all Batch 5 Ryedale leads (full cohort excluding archived/suppressed)
sequence.timing: First action — before any email sends or LinkedIn
sequence.notes: 40-day gap. If INTERESTED reply found: proceed with Day-3 bump (same thread). If NOT_INTERESTED: cancel bump, block LinkedIn, log CHANGELOG. If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress immediately, GDPR 24h rule.

sequence.action: Day-3 email bumps — all Batch 5 leads (IMAP clean per lead)
sequence.notes: Thread reply to original Day-0 email. 3-4 lines max. Signal-specific — reference the exact finding. Not a restatement of the full pitch.

sequence.action: LinkedIn connection requests — all Batch 5 leads where profile confirmed
sequence.timing: After Day-3 emails. Minimum 1-hour gap between email bump and LinkedIn request.
sequence.notes: Use templates from data/linkedin_connection_notes.json. 200-char hard limit. Post-reference preferred (check profile for posts from last 60 days FIRST). Do NOT reference email, SSL, or any audit finding in note.
MANDATORY — one entry per lead searched. Required for BRAIN note generation. No exceptions. If not written same session: LinkedIn execution is unconfirmed (same failure mode as warm pipeline).

47 days overdue. MANDATORY before any Day-7 sends. Log: all Batch 5 Day-0 sends, fu_041-045 outcomes, archive decisions, IMAP sweep results, Day-3 outcomes. If not done Friday: MUST be done before Tuesday 2026-05-19.
